data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Follow-up appointment scheduling', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions the need for follow-up appointment scheduling, yet there is no evidence provided that explicitly demonstrates the scheduling of such an appointment. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement, as the necessary confirmation is absent.
gaps: No evidence confirming the scheduling of a follow-up appointment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
